description:
Salad turns downtime into downloads. Run Salad whenever you're away from the keys to score games, gift cards, subscriptions, DLC, and more at the Salad Storefront.


Update to version 1.9.20:
- Fixes an issue where the app closed unexpectedly. 🐛
- Fixes an application crash during performance stats collection. 🐛
- Improves the reliability of WSL2 detection and installation. 👷
- Fixes an application crash on machines with time zones ahead of UTC. 🐛
- Fixes an application crash that could occur while a workload was shutting down. 🐛
- Fixes an application crash caused by unhandled rate-limit errors. 🐛
- Fixes an issue where a re-assigned workload could be ignored and never start until after Salad was restarted. 🐛
- Fixes an issue where a workload could keep running after it was scheduled to stop. 🐛
- Updates various dependencies to improve reliability. 👷
- Official release of the AMD Edition with GPU container support. 🚀
- Reduced the installer size by 30%. 🤏
- Updated container toolkit dependencies and improved container image compatibility to support more jobs. 📦
- Fixed bugs that could lead to the background service crashing, jobs getting stuck forever mid-download, and failures caused when switching to a higher paying job. 🐛
